commands.review_summary:
The PR updates backup verification to resolve legacy node-tar hardlink targets by walking the link entry’s ancestor directories and adds regression coverage for real deduplicated hardlink archives and tail-collision rejection.

PR surface: Source +17, Tests +144. Total +161 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the patch defect by source inspection: a legacy cwd-relative self-link can be reconstructed by the ancestor walk and accepted because `entries` contains the link entry path itself. I did not run the test locally because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can preserve the useful legacy hardlink compatibility while fixing the target-existence check and adding the missing corrupt-archive regressions.
